headline: Packaging Corp Of America (PKG) Stock Could Be Below Fair Value
summary: Packaging Corporation of America has delivered a 102.1% total return over the past five years, yet its valuation picture is split, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful upside while earnings-based multiples look rich at the current share price of US$233.07. A 102.1% return over five years suggests long term shareholders in Packaging Corporation of America have already seen strong value creation, so new buyers need to think carefully about what is...
